sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70429" key="neourgo/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νε-ουργός</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ναῦς</etym>) <sense id="n70429.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shipbuilder,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
